title: antennaria parlinii var. fallax
intro: Antennaria parlinii var. fallax is a subspecies of the Antennaria plant, also known as mountain everlasting or mountain silver, which is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Antennaria parlinii var. fallax include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
